required_preferences.fact: Performs prescribed cardiac rehabilitation exercises and daily health checks before leaving for the store — avoids previous back-focused PT routines except on cardiologist’s advice

supersedes.fact: Performs physical therapy exercises as prescribed every morning before leaving for the store — avoids unsupervised stretching routines to prevent aggravation

required_preferences.fact: Accepts rides from family or uses ride-sharing instead of driving himself to the store — avoids driving after cardiac incident until cleared by his physician

supersedes.fact: Drives to the store and back daily to minimize strain on his injured back — walking is avoided until cleared by his physical therapist

required_preferences.fact: Never brings up financial worries around his children — discusses serious topics with his wife after the kids are in bed
Uses WhatsApp to coordinate with distant relatives — never discusses family news through social media posts
Unplugs from all digital devices during family dinners — never brings his phone to the table
Calls parents overseas on Sunday mornings — never lets a month pass without connecting

persona: An immigrant small business owner managing finances for a family-run grocery store
